label: experimental/frontier
method: Reanalysis only (no Whisper / no ASR / no LLM run). Tests OR and AND ensembles of two complementary detectors: (1) KL detector (RQ58, character 2-gram KL-divergence, threshold 5.418144, catches Mode S but has 4 FPs, cpWER 1.030303) and (2) lang-id entropy (RQ13/RQ16, Shannon entropy over Unicode script categories, threshold 0.38, catches 94.6% of diverse hallucinations but 0% of Mode S, cpWER 1.04329). OR ensemble: MIXED if KL >= 5.418144 OR lang_id >= 0.38 (superset of each detector's flags). AND ensemble: MIXED if KL >= 5.418144 AND lang_id >= 0.38 (intersection, fewer FPs). Per-window cpWER is the chosen route's stored word-level cpWER (matches RQ16/RQ58 bit-for-bit). Bootstrap 10,000 resamples, seed=42, percentile + BCa CIs (RQ39 framework). NOTE: lang-id threshold 0.38 gives IDENTICAL results to RQ16's 0.409 (no score falls between them).
mode_s_definition: hallucinated AND lang_id_entropy < 0.409 AND length_ratio < 2.0 AND cr < 2.4 (RQ19 verified windows 22, 30)

thresholds.kl_threshold_note: RQ58's empirically-calibrated threshold at >=90% specificity (PR #981). Task spec says '5.42' (rounded); we use the precise value 5.418144 for exact reproducibility.
thresholds.lang_id_threshold_note: Task spec pre-registers 0.38. Gives IDENTICAL results to RQ16's 0.409 (no lang-id score falls between 0.38 and 0.409); both reproduce RQ16's 1.043290 with 3/40 FPs, 94.6% sensitivity.

ngram_config.reference: average 2-gram distribution of 40 non-hallucinated tracks' concatenated separated text (RQ34 separated_concat)
ngram_config.aggregation: MAX across per-speaker separated tracks (RQ12/RQ13 worst-case)

sanity_checks.note: KL-alone recomputed with threshold 5.418144 must match RQ58's 1.030303; lang-id-alone recomputed with threshold 0.38 must match RQ16's 1.043290. Both are bit-for-bit reproductions.

bootstrap.convention: rng.integers(0, n, size=n) per resample (RQ16/RQ39 verbatim)

H60a.statement: OR ensemble cpWER < 1.030 (beats KL-alone, the current best). KILLED if cpWER >= 1.030.
H60a.reason: OR ensemble cpWER = 1.030303 >= kill threshold 1.030. OR does NOT beat KL-alone. (KL-alone precise: 1.030303, delta = +0.000000)

H60b.statement: OR ensemble catches 100% Mode S (from KL) AND >= 90% all hallucinations. KILLED if < 100% Mode S OR < 90% all.
H60b.reason: OR Mode S sensitivity = 100% (2/2); all-hallucination sensitivity = 100.0% (37/37). OR catches all Mode S and >= 90% all.

H60c.statement: AND ensemble FP rate < 7.5% (3/40). KILLED if AND FP >= 7.5%.
H60c.reason: AND FP rate = 2.5% (1/40) < kill rate 7.5% (3/40). KL-alone has 4 FPs; lang-id-alone has 3 FPs.
